# Project Overview

## Architecture
**Language(s):** JavaScript
**Scale:** 15 files indexed · 188 relationships mapped · 181 total KG nodes

## Key Files (by connectivity)
- **src/core/ast-engine-ts.js** (61 connections)  [request-handler, knowledge-graph, ast-analysis]
  Initialize the tree-sitter WASM parser. Must be called (and awaited) before any parseCode() calls. Safe to call multiple times — no-ops after first. — AST analysis engine. 58 detector/parser functions
- **src/core/orchestrate.js** (28 connections)  [orchestration, src-core-orchestrate]
  Extract filename references from a text string. Module-level version — safe to call from Phase 5.6 outside verifyClaims. — Diagnostic pipeline. Runs the multi-phase analysis protocol. 18 functions.
- **src/core/graph-storage.js** (17 connections)  [knowledge-graph, memory, src-core-graph-storage]
  Compute SHA-256 hex hash of a string. Uses Node.js crypto (sync) when available (VS Code / indexer). Falls back to FNV-1a 32-bit in browser where _req — Knowledge graph construction and management. 15
- **src/core/config.js** (15 connections)  [request-handler, orchestration, formatting]
  Deterministic error-type classifier — no LLM cost. Returns one of: 'PACKAGE_RESOLUTION' | 'BUILD_CONFIG' | 'RUNTIME_TYPE' | 'RUNTIME_LOGIC' Currently  — Diagnostic pipeline. Runs the multi-phase analy
- **src/core/ast-project.js** (13 connections)  [knowledge-graph, ast-analysis, formatting]
  When provided, initParser() (WASM) is NOT called. The fn must have the same signature as parseCode(code, filename) and return a tree-sitter tree. — AST analysis engine. 10 detector/parser functions.
- **src/core/ast-bridge.js** (11 connections)  [ast-analysis, src-core-ast-bridge]
  Attach structuralAnalysis to each file object. Pure-JS regex — no WASM, no Node.js APIs. Works in all environments. — AST analysis engine. 10 detector/parser functions.
- **src/core/indexer.js** (11 connections)  [knowledge-graph, ast-analysis, src-core-indexer]
  Analyze a single file via LLM. Falls back to empty metadata if the call fails. Bug #1 fix: callProvider takes a FLAT options object, not (messages[],  — Knowledge graph construction and management. 6 
- **src/core/pattern-store.js** (11 connections)  [knowledge-graph, search, storage]
  Extract structural event tokens from astRaw output. These tokens are matched against stored pattern signatures. — Knowledge graph construction and management. 10 functions.
- **src/core/layer-detector.js** (7 connections)  [search, src-core-layer-detector]
  Bug #6 fix: check BOTH directory segments AND the filename (without extension). Previously, a flat file like `src/userController.js` would not match ' — 6 functions: toLayerId, matchFileToLayer, detec
- **src/core/parse-json.js** (7 connections)  [src-core-parse-json]
  Parse JSON from an AI response string. — 5 functions: parseAIJson, migrateSchema, findJsonCandidates, sanitizeLiteralNewlines, repairTruncatedJson.
- **src/core/search.js** (7 connections)  [knowledge-graph, src-core-search]
  Score a single node against a set of query tokens. Returns a score in [0, 1] where 1 = perfect match. Weights: name=0.4, tags=0.3, summary=0.2, filePa — Knowledge graph construction and management. 4 
- **src/core/index.js** (6 connections)  [entry-point, src-core-index]
  index.js — imports: ./config.js, ./ast-engine-ts.js, ./ast-project.js.
